questions.q: What are the three branches of government?
questions.explanation: Legislative makes laws, executive enforces, judicial interprets.

questions.q: How many U.S. senators are there?
questions.explanation: Two senators from each of the 50 states.

questions.q: How many voting members does the House of Representatives have?
questions.explanation: There are 435 voting members, divided by population.

questions.q: Who is the Commander in Chief of the military?
questions.explanation: The President leads the armed forces.

questions.q: What is the highest court in the United States?
questions.explanation: The Supreme Court is the highest court in the land.
